final_choice.row_label: Depreciation of Financial Lease Right-of-Use Assets

variables.notes: The selected XSGA bucket contains overhead expense rows (Selling, General & Admin; Administrative Exp.; Other External Expenses; Personnel Expenses) and explicitly excluded depreciation/amortization in the earlier step. These three depreciation rows appear as separate same-level operating lines above EBIT, so they should be added separately later. 'Amortization of Intangibles' is excluded because it appears linked to transfer/intangible player-rights activity rather than SG&A.
